name: GPT 5.6 Luna
description: GPT 5.6 Luna is OpenAI's preview fast and affordable GPT-5.6 model for lower-latency and cost-sensitive workloads.

details.name: availability
details.value: OpenAI previewed GPT-5.6 Luna on June 26, 2026 and the developer announcement lists the GPT-5.6 series as coming July 9, 2026. Broader ChatGPT, Codex, and API availability is expected after the limited trusted-partner preview.

details.name: prompt_caching
details.value: Supports explicit cache breakpoints and a 30-minute minimum cache life during preview.

details.name: service_tiers
details.value: Prepared for standard, flex, priority, and batch API service tiers from the July 9, 2026 release date.

details.name: pricing
details.value: Official preview pricing is $1/M input tokens, $0.1/M cached-read input tokens, $1.25/M cache-write input tokens, and $6/M output tokens on standard processing.
